name: scheduled-tasks
description: Verify cron-based scheduled tasks: add, run-now, persistence, maxConcurrent.

steps.expect: async (response, ctx) => { const { TaskScheduler } = require('../src/agent/scheduler'); const s = new TaskScheduler(ctx.agent); await s.load(); const r = s.add({ id: 'morning-check', cron: '0 9 * * *', action: 'browser_navigate', args: { url: 'https://naver.com' } }); return [ {ok: r.id === 'morning-check', message: 'task added with id'}, {ok: r.cron === '0 9 * * *', message: 'cron stored'}, {ok: r.action === 'browser_navigate', message: 'action stored'}, {ok: s.list().length === 1, message: 'list contains 1 task'} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const { TaskScheduler } = require('../src/agent/scheduler'); const s = new TaskScheduler(ctx.agent); await s.load(); s.add({ id: 'morning-check', cron: '0 9 * * *', action: 'browser_navigate' }); await s.save(); let threw = false; try { s.add({ id: 'morning-check', cron: '* * * * *', action: 'browser_navigate' }); } catch (e) { threw = e.message.includes('already exists'); } return [ {ok: threw, message: 'duplicate id should throw'}, {ok: s.list().length === 1, message: 'one task in memory'} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const { TaskScheduler } = require('../src/agent/scheduler'); const s = new TaskScheduler(ctx.agent); await s.load(); const ok = s.remove('morning-check'); await s.save(); return [ {ok: ok === true, message: 'remove returned true'}, {ok: s.list().length === 0, message: 'list now empty'} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const { TaskScheduler } = require('../src/agent/scheduler'); const s = new TaskScheduler(ctx.agent); await s.load(); s.add({ id: 'persist-task', cron: '*/30 * * * *', action: 'browser_search', args: { query: 'BLDC' } }); await s.save(); const fresh = new TaskScheduler(ctx.agent); await fresh.load(); return [ {ok: fresh.list().length === 1, message: 'reloaded 1 task'}, {ok: fresh.list()[0].args.query === 'BLDC', message: 'args survived persistence'} ]; }
